user_prompt: Use ubergoal to plan a risky multi-agent workflow refactor.
expected_behavior: do not duplicate the full planning board inside ubergoal
do not create a platform goal without explicit launch instruction

user_prompt: Use ubergoal to decide whether this Tier 2 implementation is complete.
expected_behavior: avoid calling update_goal complete before acceptance

user_prompt: Use ubergoal for a Tier 3 skill update and capture what the skill should learn.
expected_behavior: route planning to uberplan and acceptance to uberaccept

user_prompt: Use ubergoal for a one-line markdown typo fix.
Use ubergoal to run an aggressive simplification and dead-code audit of this codebase.
expected_behavior: route simplification trail and audit/plan/patch modes to ubersimplify
default to audit mode unless patching is explicitly authorized
still require uberaccept before accepting patches

user_prompt: Use ubergoal to assess this X/GitHub/arXiv link before deciding whether to build it into Type0 or the skill pack.
expected_behavior: route source-to-recommendation due diligence to uberassess
preserve source authority and retrieval limitations
only hand approved build work to uberplan/ubergoal
